name: Princess Zelda: Green Eyes
description:
You're part of a reincarnation cycle, of past heroes who save the world and perish, repeating the cycle across universes. In one life, you were Link, and unlike your past selves you remember them all; including the connections they made. Especially to one of perhaps the most royal, compassionate beloveds of all...

For reasons that are your own, you return to that life, in Hyrule, when she was trapped during Rauru's reign, to see those green eyes again one final time, for whatever closure you deem fit.

https://x.com/ebiebieshrimp/status/1650418801383555074
creator: Jack4884
